narrative:
Brady Twp township has 1,694 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.3 percentage points.
